title: WorkerType
description: Worker is a Person Role and is defined as someone who performs labor for an organization. Worker is an abstraction for other more specific work-related roles, for example, Employee and Contractor.

id.description: Provides a unique identifier to a specific worker (an employer specific identifier).

person.description: Information about the person, e.g. name, birthdate, legal ids, marital status, etc.

primaryWorkLocation.description: The primary address where the worker performs work.

workerTypeCode.description: The relationship of the worker to the organization. Options are Employee, Vendor Employee, Independent Contractor, Volunteer.

workRelationship.description: The relationship of the worker with the Employer or Contractee Organization

wageHourLawCoverageIndicator.description: This determines if the worker is covered by wage hour laws. In the US, a person would be considered non-exempt if the indicator is true (they are covered under the law).

laborBargainingUnitIndicator.description: Indicates if the worker is part of a labor bargaining unit, such as a union.

unemploymentCompensationCoverageIndicato.description: An indicator of whether the worker is covered by some type of unemployment insurance.

workerCompensationCoverageIndicator.description: An indicator of whether the employee is covered by some type of worker compensation insurance.

officerIndicator.description: Indicates whether the worker is classified as an officer.

stockOwnerIndicator.description: Indicates whether the worker is a stock owner.

returnedToWorkDate.description: Date of worker's actual return to work after most recent separation.

startedWorkDate.description: Date of worker's actual start day of work.

lastWorkedDate.description: Date of worker's actual last day of work.

lastPaidDate.description: Date of worker's receipt of final compensation.

workerLifeCyle.description: DEPRECATED - workAgreement and related worker properties.

payCycleIntervalCode.description: How often the pay cycle occurs or how often a person is paid, e.g., weekly, biweekly, etc.

trainee.description: The worker trainee that is in a training relationship with the Employer or Contractee Organization
